blocks.label: Text
blocks.html: HON'BLE MR. P. C. LYON, c.s.i., i.c.s. : ' Most interesting and useful compilation.'

blocks.label: Text
blocks.html: SIR EDWARD GAIT, k.c.s.i. : ' It appears to be a very useful compilation.'

blocks.label: Text
blocks.html: SIR JAMES DUBOULAY, k.c.s.i. : ' It will be a very useful book of reference.'

blocks.label: Text
blocks.html: HON'BLE MR. R. BURN, i.c.s. : ' I congratulate you and Mrs. Gupte on producing a work of much merit.'

blocks.label: Text
blocks.html: SIR THOMAS HOLLAND, k.c.i.e. : ' I expect to use it as a work of reference during this tour.'

blocks.label: Text
blocks.html: MR. S. W. GOODE, i.c.s. : ' It seems to me to be full of interesting information given in a most attractive form.'

blocks.label: Text
blocks.html: SIR GEORGE BIRDWOOD : ' You have done the work in a manner most creditable to you, and it should secure to you the sincere gratitude of your fellow-countrymen and the respect of scholars and Anglo-Indians who desire a better knowledge of India.'

blocks.label: Text
blocks.html: SIR RICHARD TEMPLE (Bart.), c.b., c.i.e. : ' Your book is extraordinarily interesting and will no doubt prove a mine of information for future students.'
